# **Audio Experiment Plan Template**

## **Hypothesis**

```text
[Audio strategy] will improve [metric] for [format] because [mechanism].
```

## **Controlled variables**

```text
same visual base
same caption family
same creator
same platform
same post window
same duration band
```

## **Variants**

| Variant | Voice | Music | SFX | Goal |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| A | human/AI authority | low pulse | light | clarity/save |
| B | human/AI authority | none | light | voice clarity |
| C | captions only | trend sound | none | reach/template |
| D | none | generated loop | strong | montage/replay |

## **Metrics**

```text
1s retention
3s retention
completion
replay
share rate
save rate
comment rate
follow rate
```

## **Decision rule**

```text
Keep variant if AudioLift > 0 and risk acceptable.
Mutate if close but weak on one metric.
Retire if consistently below baseline.
```
